name: autotestgen-mcp
description: Custom MCP server for AutoTestGen — high-level tools that wrap multi-step Playwright work into single calls. Reduces LLM token usage and improves reliability over session/rate limits.
_notes: Run 'npm install' once in this folder to install all dependencies locally.
The server uses your system-installed Chrome or Edge — no browser download needed.
Do NOT run 'npx playwright install' — that would download Chromium, which is not used.
